mapper.select: /* 에이전트 목록 조회 agent.selectAgentList */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID , A.AGENT_NM , A.AGENT_TYPE_CD , CC.CODE_NM AS AGENT_TYPE_CD_NM , A.TEMPERATURE , A.TEMP_DEFAULT_YN , A.TOP_P , A.TOP_P_DEFAULT_YN , A.DESCRIPTION , A.SORT_ORD , A.USE_YN , A.LAST_MDF_DT , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , CASE WHEN A.AGENT_TYPE_CD = '001' THEN (SELECT count(B.DATASET_ID) FROM TB_AGT_DS B WHERE A.AGENT_ID = B.AGENT_ID) WHEN A.AGENT_TYPE_CD = '002' THEN (SELECT count(C.DATAMART_ID) FROM TB_AGT_DM C WHERE A.AGENT_ID = C.AGENT_ID) ELSE 0 END AS CONN_COUNT FROM TB_AGT A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE CC ON A.AGENT_TYPE_CD = CC.CODE_ID AND CC.CODE_GRP_ID = 'AT000001' WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.AGENT_ID
/* 모델 옵션 조회 agent.selectModelList */ SELECT A.MODEL_ID , A.MODEL_NAME FROM TB_LLM_MDL A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
